description: Produce an India statutory accident / dangerous-occurrence NOTIFICATION for a DETECTED state — the legacy accident form + deadline (e.g. MH Form 24 within 24h + Form 24A; TN and DL accident-notice forms [GAP] until verified; the DGMS-prescribed 24h notice for mines) — legacy-first, with the OSH-Code transition note appended. Use it to assemble the filled state notification form/register itself after an incident; it does NOT re-run the investigation/RCA (point back to incident-investigation for that). State detection is MANDATORY; the form resolves from the KB engine row or DGMS layer or is [GAP]-flagged, never invented; no hard-coded national form. Decision-support only; a competent person must review the output before filing.
name: india-accident-notice
notes: Markdown-report degradation; run the intake conversationally.
